steps.title: Identify the repeated expression and substitute
steps.content:
Notice that $(4 - 5x)$ appears in three terms on the left side and once on the right side. This is a substitution trigger. Let $u = (4 - 5x)$. The equation becomes:
$$5u + 4u + 9 = 8u + 6$$

steps.title: Combine like terms and solve for u
steps.content:
On the left, combine the $u$ terms:
$$9u + 9 = 8u + 6$$
Subtract $8u$ from both sides:
$$u + 9 = 6$$
Subtract 9 from both sides:
$$u = -3$$
